violations.text: Observed mop not being properly air-dry. Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. After use, mops shall be placed in a position that allows them to be air-dry without soiling wall, equipment, or supplies. Proper mop air-drying procedures reviewed. PIC place mops to hang dry at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Wet wiping cloth was observed stored on prep counter. -Per PIC proper procedure is to places wet sanitized cloth in dirty bin. -PIC relocated wet cloth to dirty bin. (B)Cloths in-use for wiping counters and other EQUIPMENT surfaces shall be: (1) Held between uses in a chemical sanitizer solution at a concentration specified under § 4-501.114 Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025
Observed gasket located in the lower freezer door area in lunch prep area was not in good repair. Per PIC gaskets are on order. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025
The side panel to the back door in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025
The gaskets on a door of a freezer unit were in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
